metadata.title: Cambridge Movers Gold Mock 3
metadata.description: Manually authored A1 Movers gold mock 3 — full 51-item form with Health, Culture, and Environment themes aligned to the M2.0 blueprint.
metadata.authoringNotes: M4.1 Gold Mock — manually authored and academically reviewed.

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Look at the pictures. Listen and draw a line from each name to the correct person.

This is Mia. She's brushing her teeth in the bathroom.
Omar is wearing a colourful traditional costume for the festival.
Clara is putting empty bottles in the green recycling bin.
Finn always eats fruit at break time. Today he's eating an apple.
Aisha is dancing a folk dance on the stage.
Noah is planting a tree between two benches in the park.
audio.caption: Link names to pictures

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and write the missing word or number.

The doctor says eat more apples every day.
This year's international festival is from Brazil.
They planted twelve trees in the park last weekend.
Mum is drinking water instead of fizzy drinks.
At the cultural show they play the drum.
The health walk in the park starts at nine o'clock.
audio.caption: Write words or numbers

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and tick the correct picture.

The children are doing yoga in the sports hall.
Salad with vegetables is healthy for lunch.
In culture club they are learning salsa dancing.
At school we must recycle paper and glass in different bins.
The museum is about ancient history and old objects.
On Saturday they are going to clean the beach near our town.
audio.caption: Tick the correct picture

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and colour or draw.

Colour the recycling bin green, please.
Now colour the first-aid box white.
Draw a flag on top of the building.
Colour the water bottle blue.
Draw flowers in the garden.
Draw a line from the boy to the museum entrance.
audio.caption: Colour and draw

questions.questionText: Match the word 'hospital' to the picture.

pairs.rightText: Place where doctors help sick people

pairs.rightText: Special event with music, food and dancing

questions.questionText: Match the word 'recycling' to the picture.

pairs.rightText: Using old things again instead of throwing them away

pairs.rightText: Person who looks after your teeth

questions.questionText: Read: "The nurse is helping the patient in the…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: The nurse is helping the patient in the hospital room.

questions.questionText: Read: "We wear special colourful clothes for th…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: We wear special colourful clothes for the carnival parade.

questions.questionText: Read: "Don't throw rubbish in the river because…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: Don't throw rubbish in the river because fish live there.

questions.questionText: Read: "I drink milk every day because it is goo…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: I drink milk every day because it is good for my bones.

choices.text: Child drinking a glass of milk

questions.questionText: Read: "Our class is learning about Japanese foo…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: Our class is learning about Japanese food and chopsticks.

questions.questionText: Read: "The beach is dirty so we must pick up li…" Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: The beach is dirty so we must pick up litter before we swim.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Hi! I'm Lin from China. I eat rice,…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Hi! I'm Lin from China. I eat rice, vegetables and fruit every day. I don't drink fizzy drinks because they aren't good for me. After school I walk in the park with my grandma. I want to be strong and healthy.

choices.text: Lin eats healthy food every day.
Lin never walks in the park.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Last Friday was cultural day at our…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Last Friday was cultural day at our school. Students wore clothes from different countries and brought traditional food to share. We listened to music from Africa and Asia. My favourite dish was spicy rice from India.

choices.text: Students celebrated cultural day at school.
They only listened to one song.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Our class started a recycling proje…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Our class started a recycling project this term. We collect paper, plastic bottles and old batteries in special boxes. Every Friday two students take the boxes to the recycling centre. Our teacher says we are helping the planet.

choices.text: The class collects items for recycling.
They throw everything in one bin.
They never visit the recycling centre.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Yesterday I went to the doctor beca…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Yesterday I went to the doctor because I had a sore throat. The doctor looked at my throat and said I must drink warm water and rest. I didn't go to school today. I feel better now.

choices.text: The child visited the doctor yesterday.
The doctor said to eat only ice cream.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Next month our town is going to hav…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Next month our town is going to have a world music concert in the park. Musicians from Mexico, Kenya and Scotland are going to play. We are going to buy tickets next week. My family loves listening to music from other countries.

choices.text: There will be a world music concert in the park.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "On tree planting day our whole scho…" and choose the best answer.

content.passage: On tree planting day our whole school went to the forest near town. We dug holes and planted young trees together. The ranger showed us how to water them carefully. We must go back in spring to check they are growing well.

choices.text: The school planted trees on tree planting day.
They cut down all the trees.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture. Write one sentence about the dentist.

content.prompt: Look at the picture. Write one sentence about the dentist.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture. Write one sentence about the festival.

content.prompt: Look at the picture. Write one sentence about the children at the festival.

questions.questionText: Write a note to your teacher about sports day.

content.prompt: Write a note to your teacher about sports day at school.
content.taskDescription: Tell your teacher about sports day.

questions.questionText: Write a message inviting your friend to a cultural event.

content.prompt: Write a message inviting your friend to a cultural event at school.
content.taskDescription: Invite your friend to the event.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture. Write two or three sentences about the recycling centre.

content.prompt: Look at the picture. Write two or three sentences about the recycling centre.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture. Write two or three sentences about the healthy lunch.

content.prompt: Look at the picture. Write two or three sentences about the healthy lunch.
content.taskDescription: Describe the healthy lunch on the table.
requiredPoints: Say what food you can see

questions.questionText: Look at the two park differences env pictures. Tell your partner about the differences.

content.prompt: Look at the two pictures of a park — one clean and one dirty. Tell your partner about five differences between them.
followUpQuestions: Is there litter in picture B?
How many trees are in picture A?
Where is the recycling bin in picture A?
What is the boy doing in picture B?

questions.questionText: Answer the examiner's questions about about you health culture.

content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about yourself, healthy habits, and culture in your country.
followUpQuestions: What's your name and how old are you?
What healthy food do you like?
What festival or celebration do you enjoy?
How do you help the environment at home or school?
What sport do you do to stay healthy?

questions.questionText: Look at these pictures and tell the story of how the children cleaned the beach.

content.prompt: Look at these pictures and tell the story of how the children cleaned the beach.
followUpQuestions: What was wrong with the beach at the start?
What did the children take with them?
How did they feel at the end?
What did they do when the beach was clean?

coverageAchieved.notes: Authored for M3.1 Gold Mock specification.
